tation. ]]> </documentation> The type attribute identifies the format of the documentation. Accessor hosts should support at least HTML and Markdown formats. For HTML, because of the embedded markup, XML requires the CDATA block as in the above

rkup, XML requires the CDATA block as in the above example to prevent parsing of the documentation as part of parsing the accessor specification. For Markdown format, the type should be given as text/markdown . Back to accessor specification Edit - H
